blockingIssues.description: MAPJ_LOG_LEVEL is incorrectly documented as an environment variable in CONTRIBUTING.md section 2.5 (line 164), but this environment variable is NOT implemented in the codebase. Only --log-level CLI flag exists. The environment variables that ARE implemented are MAPJ_TRACE_ID and MAPJ_OBSERVE. Remove MAPJ_LOG_LEVEL from the environment variables table or change to document it as a CLI flag only.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Investigate skills indexing timing. Multiple workers (update-readme, update-contributing, update-changelog) reported that 'docs-worker' skill was not found during execution, yet the skill exists at .factory/skills/docs-worker/SKILL.md. Consider whether skill discovery is synchronous with git operations or if there's a delay.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Features update-readme, update-contributing, and update-changelog all reported docs-worker skill not found. The skill was created in commit 3a5cbfd but workers couldn't invoke it.
